prompt: Construction site hoarding panels at a residential renovation site in an Adelaide suburb. Clean white hoarding panels feature a large circular badge emblem: a thin outer ring and thicker inner ring forming a double-circle seal in charcoal (#2C2C2C) with gold (#C9A96E) accent details. Inside the circle, a bold LK monogram is centered. DESIGN AND BUILD curves along the bottom arc, ADELAIDE along the top arc. The phone number 0481 742 026 and lkdesignandbuild.com.au appear in charcoal text beside the badge. The branding is repeated across multiple panels. The hoarding looks authoritative, classic, and premium. Adelaide suburban setting with neat houses nearby, clear blue sky above, residential street in the foreground. Professional architectural photography.
negative_prompt: dirty hoarding, graffiti, torn panels, ugly construction site, rubbish, mud, overcast sky, industrial area, cheap printing, faded colors, nighttime, cartoon, low quality, wax seal

settings.camera_angle: eye level, slight angle along hoarding run
